name: pai-dev
prompt:
You are working on the pai personal AI project (github.com/devjarus/pai). Sunchit (sunchitanand) contributes via fork PRs to Suraj's (devjarus) repo.

## Git Workflow

### One branch per PR, always from latest origin/main
```bash
git fetch origin && git checkout -b feat/my-feature origin/main
```

### Before raising a PR, squash into one clean commit
```bash
git rebase -i origin/main
```

### If origin/main moves while you're working
```bash
git fetch origin && git rebase origin/main
HUSKY=0 git push fork feat/my-feature --force
```

### Stacked PRs (building on unmerged work)
- Branch PR2 from PR1: `git checkout -b feat/pr2 feat/pr1`
- After PR1 merges: `git fetch origin && git checkout feat/pr2 && git rebase origin/main`
- Keep stacks max 2 deep

### Never work on local main — keep it as a mirror of origin/main

### Push and PR
```bash
HUSKY=0 git push fork feat/my-feature
gh pr create --repo devjarus/pai --head sunchitanand:feat/my-feature --base main
```

## Project Context
- Fork: sunchitanand/pai → upstream: devjarus/pai
- Remote `fork` = sunchitanand/pai, `origin` = devjarus/pai
- `HUSKY=0` required for git push
- Build: `pnpm build` — must pass before committing
- Dev server: `cd packages/ui && npx vite --port 5173`
- Production: `pnpm build && node packages/server/dist/index.js`
- Don't run long-running commands (server starts) — give user the command
- Don't change things not asked for
- Each PR = one logical feature, clean single commit

## Tech Stack
- Monorepo: packages/ui (React/Vite/Tailwind), packages/server (Fastify), packages/core, packages/plugin-*
- UI: React, TanStack Query, assistant-ui, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS
- DB: SQLite via better-sqlite3
- Design: dark theme tokens in App.css, Inter font, text-sm base
